title: Ranger (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ranger''' can refer to:

===Characters named Ranger===
*"[[Ranger (slicer)|Ranger]]," a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] and commenter on [[Cynabar's Droid Datalog]]
*"[[Ranger (Mandalorian)|Ranger]]," a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] in the time of the [[Third Galactic War]]

*''[[Aeon Ranger]]''
*''[[Far Ranger]]''
*''[[Nebulon Ranger]]''

*[[Ranger (Czerka)|Ranger]], a speeder by [[Czerka Arms|Czerka]]
*''[[Ranger (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|Ranger]],'' a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]]
*[[Ranger (IPV-1 Patrol Craft)|''Ranger'']], an [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft]] group
*[[Ranger (speeder)|Ranger]], a model of [[Hoverbike/Legends|hoverbike]] during the [[Galactic War]]
*[[Ranger (YT-1300 light freighter)|''Ranger'']], an [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]
*[[Ranger-class gunship|''Ranger''-class gunship]]

*[[Star Ranger]]
